{% from "chirpui/layout.html" import stack, cluster, block %} {% from "chirpui/button.html" import btn %} {% from "chirpui/command_bar.html" import command_bar %} {% from "chirpui/command_palette.html" import command_palette, command_palette_trigger %} {% from "chirpui/breadcrumbs.html" import breadcrumbs %} {% from "chirpui/route_tabs.html" import render_route_tabs %} {% block page_root %} {{ command_palette(id="fs-admin-palette", search_url="/fs-search", placeholder="Search admin...") }}
{% block page_root_inner %}
{{ render_route_tabs(tab_items, current_path, target="#page-root") }}
{% call stack(gap="sm") %} {{ breadcrumbs(breadcrumb_items, overflow="collapse", max_items=3) }} {% call cluster(gap="sm") %}

Filesystem admin

{{ command_palette_trigger(target="fs-admin-palette", label="Search admin", placeholder="Search admin", shortcut="/", icon="search", density="sm") }} {% end %} {% end %} {% call command_bar(surface_variant="muted", density="sm", wrap="scroll", aria_label="Filesystem admin tools") %} {{ btn("Review", variant="ghost", size="sm") }} {{ btn("Suspend", variant="ghost", size="sm") }} {% end %}
{% block page_content %} {% call block() %}

{{ view_title }}

{{ view_copy }}

{% end %} {% end %}
{% end %}
{% end %}
